title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZKPs)
description: Architect validation logic using zk-SNARKs or STARKs to prove knowledge of a secret without revealing the secret data. Design systems where parties can verify assertions without exposing the underlying sensitive information.
objectives: Architect validation logic using zk-SNARKs or STARKs to prove knowledge of a secret without revealing the secret data.
Design systems where parties can verify assertions without exposing the underlying sensitive information.
